legacy-low32-2a1be0a4-fs258.justification: Single compatibility variant group under compat-repl-dims-unique on the strict file-select fixture.
selection_notes: Only one compatibility variant group exists for this family.
Observed sample_replacement_dims is 640x160 on the strict file-select fixture.

legacy-low32-dd798ca8-fs258.justification: Single compatibility variant group surfaced by the deterministic file-select right probe.
selection_notes: Only one compatibility variant group exists for this family.
Observed sample_replacement_dims is 560x160 on the file-select right probe.

legacy-low32-42779bdd-fs258.justification: Matches the current strict file-select sample_replacement_dims observation (120x120) and is the strongest live runtime preview candidate so far, but remains non-binding until validated against imported output and future fixture evidence.
supporting_notes: Observed sample_replacement_dims is 120x120 on the strict file-select fixture.
Current review scoring ranks 120x120 above the other candidate variant groups for this family.
Applying the 120x120 variant across all four strict file-select 8x16 low32 keys reproduces the broader low32-any hit count (90 hits / 75 misses).
That same all-family 120x120 runtime preview lands much closer to the low32-any control (AE 6214) than all-family 144x144 (AE 11560) or all-family 64x64 (AE 15054).
overturn_conditions: A new strict fixture or imported-output comparison shows the correct visual result tracks 64x64 or 144x144 instead of 120x120.
A stronger selector field becomes available and points consistently at another variant group.
Imported-output validation shows 120x120 produces placement, sharpness, or corruption problems that another candidate avoids.

reasons: Its all-family runtime preview is materially farther from the low32-any control than 120x120.
Carries the broadest candidate pool and palette spread of the three groups.
Its all-family runtime preview only reaches 88 hits / 77 misses, weaker than the 120x120 and 144x144 previews.
